about.title: About Mr.LUBE
about.description: Mr.LUBE Company was established to help citizens who have difficulty finding repair shops and lack time to find mechanics. Our main goal is to provide quality and trustworthy vehicle care services. Currently, we have created the Mr.LUBE website to help parents and siblings with their car maintenance issues.
about.mainService: Our most important service is the Oil Change service, which uses high-quality products with international standards. Our team of expert mechanics ensures that the oil change will make the engine run better, smoother, and last longer.
about.otherServices: In addition, Mr.LUBE also provides other services such as:
about.whyChooseSubtitle: MR.LUBE provides high-quality services to ensure your car runs at its best

whyChoose.fastServiceDesc: Easy booking and quick service without long waits.
whyChoose.expertsDesc: Highly skilled team with years of experience.
whyChoose.qualityDesc: We only use original and high-quality products.

serviceList: Inspection and replacement of Air Filter and Oil Filter
Coolant Flush and cooling system cleaning
Brake inspection, brake fluid change, and brake system maintenance
Interior cleaning and car window wiping
about.mission: Mr.LUBE always focuses on fast, satisfying, and efficient service to ensure customers have the best car care experience.
about.missionTitle: Fulfilling Our Mission with Quality and Trust
about.missionSubtitle: We are committed to providing high-quality vehicle care services, meeting customer needs, and creating a new car care experience.
